seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The keyword "art" must appear at least five times.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "art" in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The keyword "art" must appear at least five times. Avoid using the keyword "art" in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Visual Displays

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am a keen admirer of the creative works showcased at your establishment and am very interested in learning more about what you have planned for the near future. I have been following your impressive dedication to presenting fine visual expressions, and I would love to stay informed.

Could you please provide me with information regarding any upcoming exhibitions? I am particularly interested in discovering new collections and different forms of human expression on display. Understanding the schedule of your forthcoming showcases would be greatly appreciated.

If there is a digital program or calendar detailing these forthcoming visual journeys, I would be very grateful if you could direct me to it. I look forward to exploring the next display of creative endeavor your venue will host.

Thank you very much for your time and attention to this inquiry.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number or Preferred Contact Info]<turn|>
